title: feat: add p0 admin operations summary api
goal: Add GET /admin/operations/summary as an API-only safe summary for P0 admin operational state.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Stop if package.json, pnpm-lock, contracts, migrations, workflows, scripts, apps/web, apps/overlay, real YouTube API, real OAuth, real RPC, real DB, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, wallet/RPC/deploy changes, or readiness/compliance claims are introduced.
doneCriteria: admin operations summary requires admin bearer token
includes rate-limit status without raw key
excludes raw token and token fingerprint
excludes logs_url jobs_url stack stdout stderr
existing admin DLQ visibility tests still pass
existing admin DLQ redrive tests still pass
existing admin audit export tests still pass
existing admin rate-limit tests still pass
securityBoundaries: No DB driver, Redis, or Kafka dependency is added.
No real DB connection is introduced.
No migration is changed or executed.
No real YouTube API or OAuth token is used.
No RPC, wallet, deploy, contracts, workflows, web, or overlay changes.
Admin operations summary uses safe metadata only.
Raw admin token, token fingerprint, IP address, and user-agent are not returned.
No runtime, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness is claimed.
residualRisks: This is local/internal admin operations summary API only.
Web Admin Console readiness, production operations readiness, distributed metrics, durable analytics, and real retention policy remain future scoped work.
humanConfirmation: AI review is not human approval.
Merge remains blocked until same-head checks pass after evidence refresh.

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts, runtime dependencies, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, package.json, or pnpm-lock changes are introduced.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Adds local/internal admin operations summary API.

runtimeSmokeRationale: No runtime readiness is claimed; this is local/internal admin operations summary API only.

reviewScope.scope: P0 admin operations summary API, admin auth, DLQ counts, audit counts, rate-limit summary, tests, docs, and .codex evidence.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is exposing tokens, secret-like data, raw operational payloads, or implying production operations readiness; tests and docs reject those outcomes.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Admin operations summary tests, existing admin DLQ visibility/redrive/audit export/rate-limit tests, full repository test suite, evidence checks, quality self-protection, secret scan, and GitHub same-head checks.
